When Jim Crawford got home, his daughter Clara was fast asleep. Glad to see that she was no longer suffering from the loss of her mother, he had grieved alongside her from day one which made their recovery go a lot better than it usually should. He was still worried for her, she had just gotten on break from graduating middle school, that’s where things went downhill. Two weeks after her graduation her mother had developed stage two brain cancer, they had done all that they could but, it was too late to save her. They mourned for the next two months, her dying words still lingering on his mind. * sad flashback* he was in the operation room crying his eyes out next to his wife’s bed. “Hunny, don’t worry about me.” She said weakly. “We always knew that this would happen, I just didn’t expect it to be so soon. Listen I want you do a favor for me, will you do that?” “Yes, yes anything I swear I’ll do anything, just tell me.” He said frantically, knowing that he was running out of time. “When our little girl becomes 14, I would like her to have my bracelets, and you should get this for her, from the both of us. Okay?” She said as she said giving Jim a picture of a necklace: (https://www.pinterest.com/pin/8154330762...) “You can find the necklace at a jewelry shop nearby, it’s a magical day, so I would like to complement it with a magical gift.” She said which confused Jim. ‘There isn’t such a thing as magic, right?’ He thought to himself. “Of course, I will gladly get our daughter this gift, from the both of us right? Your bracelets will be from you though.” He said. “Thank you...” she said as all he heard after was a flatline coming from the monitor. *sad flashback end* he quickly wiped off his tears and placed her gifts in his drawer. ‘Lord give me the strength to raise my daughter to be a fine person.’ He quietly prayed having become a devout Christian in the middle of his mourning. He went to sleep, waiting for the day of his daughters birthday which was next Saturday, two weeks before her freshman year of high school would start.

(Sorry for cutting it short! But I thought that you guys would like to make your own additions to this with your own personal spin!)

The rest of the night felt very uncomfortable for Clara, she twisted and turned feeling hot and a tightness on her body. After about two hours of uncomfortable sleep she found herself in a comfortable position, it was uneventful for the remainder of the night. She woke up feeling energized, feeling like she could run a mile and still have plenty of energy to spend. She rubbed her eyes as she stared at her snout, in the clear shape and form of a wolf muzzle. She got up and went into the bathroom, there she took off all her clothes. She looked at the mirror, she was taller by three inches. Going from 5’6” to 5’9”, not much but noticeable, and then her reflection said it all as she looked at herself. She felt the voice say ‘So, did I tell you that you would look like me or what?’ ‘You were right, I am a mirror image of you but shorter and less developed.’ She thought back noticing that she had a dual consciousness just as the wolf girl had said. The next thing that she noticed when she turned around was that she was completely colorblind, her pink shower curtains being a light gray for her. She shrugged this off, as she already knew this would happen. She took a shower and enjoyed it a lot more than before, her pelt getting a new sheen to it. She finished and shaking the water off before drying off with a towel, she went to her room and put on the same clothes she saw the wolf girl wearing in her dream. She found that there was a designated spot for her tail to fit in, which she was grateful for because she knew how uncomfortable it was without one. She went downstairs her tail pointing up and swaying from side to side, she knew that she would never be able to hide her emotions from anyone anymore, her wolf body would express even the tiniest bit of emotion that she would feel. ‘Great, now I’m a walking emotion teller.’ She thought to herself now making it plainly obvious for everyone else to know what she’s feeling at any given moment in time. She was slightly annoyed, which showed on her face instantly. She prepared herself a bowl of cereal as she heard and smelled her father coming down the stairs. “Good morning dad.” She said, her voice had changed so that it made her all the more beautiful and cute. “Good morning Clara, how was your sleep?” He asked taking in the new sight of his daughter. “It wasn’t too bad, I was very uncomfortable for a while but I think that was because I was transforming. Other than that I slept like a stuffed animal, which now I know how it feels, it’s very comfy, no matter where or how I sleep I was always comfortable.” She said. “Well we should get you used to your new abilities, I don’t want you to loose your hearing.” He said. “Sounds like fun!” She said her tail wagging in clear excitement and joy. For the next two weeks they worked on her abilities, and had gotten her to be able to control all of them at will,
Pshe was clearly excited because she had told her friend what happened to her, her friend was very happy for her friend, a little jealous but happy nonetheless. The day before she was supposed to go to school her father had scheduled a meeting with all of them, stating that it concerns the welfare of his daughter. They went to the school and got out, she was wearing a thin black hoodie on top of a white shirt and thin grey sweatpants, when they got inside they waited it the meeting room. The principal and the rest of the teachers walked in as their jaws dropped, they saw a wolf like humanoid girl who was very beautiful and cute. They all sat down and asked, “So Mr. Crawford, whose the girl? And what did you think was so important to drag all of us in here?” They asked very bluntly and kinda condescending. “Well if you must know this is my daughter Clara, she will be attending here starting tomorrow morning with her friend. But as you can see we kinda have a little issue, you see two weeks ago my daughter had turned 14, her mother, my wife passed away from brain cancer 5 months ago. We were in the slums and were down for a while. Her mother bless her soul, wanted for her to have two things on her birthday from her and from both of us. She wanted to give her, her personal bracelets that she got as a wedding gift from her parents which you see her wearing now. The other was an ornate necklace, which she is also wearing, which I got from a magical jewelry shop. I know I sound crazy saying that magic exists but after her transformation, I was 100% convinced otherwise. Hopefully you can see where I’m coming from, I need you as her teachers to help her out in anyway you can. I’m not saying that you babysit her, but I don’t think she will have an easy time fitting in. She will be an outcast, and I’d hate to see her go down the road of depression. So please will you help me, help her? He asked finished with the story. He looked at them who all had tears in their eyes. “Okay Mr. Crawford, I believe that we are all in agreement when I say that, we will do whatever we can to help her out, not only in academics but with her social life as well. I promise you that if anyone who’s bullying her because of her looks, they will be dealt with on sight. She will have trouble, that’s just thanks to her being a freshman, but now we have a real problem, I believe that if we don’t make it clear to not harass this girl now, they always will. Thank you for taking your time to tell us this, I truthfully thought that you were just another person who wanted to bribe us, but now I believe otherwise. You may leave now, and we will insure her safety here in the school. The principal said waiving his hand goodbye and the rest of the teachers nodding in agreement. She was relieved, now that she knew that she was going to have people that she could rely upon for support...

That is the end of this chapter hope you enjoyed!

Before I start I realized that I forgot to make her hypoallergenic. So in this I’ll explain how she found that out, as well as her school life. (P.s. I hate schools that have a specific dress code, so this school won’t have one. And for those of you who don’t know what hypoallergenic means I’ll explain later on). Anyways enjoy!

Clara and her father had arrived at her personal physicians workplace the same day, she was interested in what was happening. “Dad, what are we doing at the doctors? I feel perfectly fine.” She said. “We are here because some people might think you’re lying about who you are. We are also here to make sure that you are hypoallergenic, we don’t want people to have an allergic reaction to whenever you’re around.” He said. (And yes, certain people have to have an EpiPen around animals, I was one of them before I out grew it) they went inside and patiently waited while they were getting stared at be other people, they got called her up and they went with the doctor to get her measurements. She ignored all the stares and attention as she waited patiently for a nurse, the nurse got there, asked a few questions took her vitals noting them down and left. After five minutes her doctor came inside. “So what is it that you were concerned about?” He said looking at the wolf girl. “Oh I see that you’ve brought in someone new.” Said the doctor. “No not at all doctor, this is what I was concerned about. You see my daughter Clara, who is sitting right there, as you can see she’s gone through a pretty big change.” Said Jim. “I wasn’t sure of how to address this issue properly so I brought her here, I would like you to do some blood work, make sure that she is still my daughter, and a hypoallergenic test. I know that the last one we would have to go to a veterinary clinic, but since I wasn’t sure about how they would react I took her here instead.” Said Jim. “Oh so the wolf girl is Clara, sure there isn’t any problem with that, although I will have to call a friend, he owes me a few favors. He is probably one of the best veterinarians I know of, I’ll have him come over and evaluate Clara, I am not sure of what to look for on a wolf girl so I’ll have him do it. In the meantime though I’ll have a look at her blood work, see if her genetics changed.” The doctor said. After that he took a syringe and drew 150ccs of blood from Clara, he went off and they were alone once again. After an hour the doctor came back with another person following behind him. “You had better not be pulling my leg here Nick, I don’t like cruel jokes.” “Thomas, relax I already have the results from the DNA test, all I need for you to do is check on my patient.” Said her doctor walking in. “Clara this is my friend Thomas, he will be evaluating you to see if you need to be evaluated by a vet or I can just do my usual thing.” He said. She held out her hand and shook the vets hand. “Alright, this is the coolest thing I’ve seen. So do you want them to be here or no?” He asked. “I would like to have my doctor here, but I would like my dad to wait outside.” She said. The doctors were in shock at the beauty and cuteness in her voice. “Okay then, Mr. Crawford can you wait outside? It will only take me 10 minutes.” Jim left and the vet checked on her and educated the doctor on what to do the next time she visits. The vet concluded that she was an extremely healthy wolf-like human and found no flaws, he then took some of her fur and left. Her father came back inside and waited for all of the tests to be done, after another hour the vet came back. “So Clara, what would you like to have the news of first?” He asked. “I think that I want my DNA test results first.” She said. “Well I am happy to pronounce that even though you don’t look like a human anymore, you are still Clara Crawford, congratulations the test came out positive.” Her tail started wagging at the news. “Ok well your fur just came out of the lab, I have the results here. Here it is and I quote, ‘Despite being 100% wolf fur we have found that this specimen is not only hypoallergenic but will not shed or grow a new coat, the only places that will grow back fur is if it was ripped out or cut. This species fur is immaculate, softer and smoother than any previously known material.’ Well looks like you are indeed hypoallergenic, also your fur is now the softest, smoothest material on the planet.” He said finished with his long speech. Her tail wagged even faster, absolutely thrilled at the news, she smiled happily making everyone’s heart in the room leap for joy. (Yes, I made her the ultimate bean). After that they went home, wondering what the next day had in store for them.

The next morning came as she stretched, yawning and walked to her bathroom. There she took a pleasant shower, after she turned the water off she shook herself moderately dry before drying the rest off with a towel. She went inside her room and put on what she saw the wolf wearing, having two pairs of those clothing items. She went downstairs and had breakfast and packed her lunch, it contained a little bit of meat that was raw, she was recommended to eat raw meat by the veterinarian. She didn’t argue because she noticed that if she didn’t have some raw meat alongside meals that she would find herself starving, this was because she was half wolf which needed the raw meat to sustain and satisfy her appetite for nourishment. She headed back upstairs to brush and floss her teeth, the veterinarian taught her how to take proper care of her new teeth and body, not wanting her to hurt herself because she didn’t do something correctly. She grabbed her backpack which was full of her necessary school supplies and went back downstairs and greeted her father. Jim Crawford had gotten used to seeing his daughter up and ready to go at least an hour before he was, he was glad to see that her appetite had grown, she now had very heavy and healthy three meals every day, instead of two unfulfilling and unhealthy meals a day. They talked still getting all the sleep from their systems, they both yawned again finding themselves half awake, after an hour he took Clara to school and waved goodbye to each other. She grumbled as she walked up the stairs into her four story high school building, she walked into the classroom looking down at her schedule to make sure that she was in the correct home room class. She saw that there was a seating order in the room, each seat had a name on it, she sat down in her seat putting her backpack beside her chair and saw that her friend would be sitting next to her. She was happy that her friend was in the same class as her and noticed that the teacher had just walked in, they struck up a conversation seeing how the other person's day was going until she heard running in the hallway. The door was flung open as her classmates practically ran inside and sat down not seemingly noticing her and sat down in their assigned seats, her friend was the only one who noticed her as she sat down talking to her newly changed friend. The bell rang signaling the start of the day, they all quieted down and said here when their names were called, the other students finally noticed the wolf girl when she yawned cutely as she said here. The classrooms' hearts melted at the adorable sound, as they all silently vowed to protect the cuteness from any danger at all costs, even the teacher said this silent vow even though he already agreed to help her beforehand. After this they all picked their lockers, Clara picked one that wasn’t too close or too far away from the door, she picked the one to the right of her friends locker which was ¼th the total locker distance from the one in the far corner. She laid her school supplies in the locker, the only thing she had now was her backpack on her shoulders as she headed to her next class walking next to her friend Mary. They discovered that they had the same schedules and would be sitting next to each other for half of the classes, they were both happy about this and sat next to each other during lunch. “Alrighty then, My name is Mr. Martin, I will be your seventh period teacher before you head to choose your eighth period elective for this year. Now, I am going to be passing out a sheet with all the different sports, clubs and other classes that you may take in this school, the sport, club or classes can be changed quarterly if you decide you don’t like it anymore you the end of the quarter, but until then you will be stuck with your choice.” He said passing out pamphlets to everyone. He then went back into his subject which was teaching them different languages, this excited all of them especially Clara who was looking forward to learning different languages. She walked down the hall with Mary trying to figure out what she wanted to do, she looked at the sheet and saw that there was a golf team her father had gotten her golf clubs last year but never played not sure how to. She decided that she would give it a try not wanting her parents money to go to waste, she signed up for golf and noticed that it was an after school elective, she saw a music class and signed up for it as her eighth period elective. She went home and got her golf bag out, she noticed that her father had readjusted her clubs so that they would fit her no matter how tall she was. She thanked her father for doing that and they ate dinner together.

That’s it for this chapter, I hope you enjoyed!
